title: Isla's Sleepy Treasure Hunt
synopsis: Little Isla discovers a magical treasure map in her bedroom that leads her on a gentle nighttime adventure to find the most precious treasure of all - a perfect night's sleep.

pages.text: Isla was getting ready for bed when something crinkled under her pillow. She pulled out an old, yellowy map with dotted lines and pictures of treasure chests. The map had her name written in fancy letters at the top!

illustration.description: A young girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes sitting on her bed in pajamas, holding up an aged parchment treasure map. The map shows dotted trails, compass roses, and treasure chest symbols in sepia tones with jewel accents.
illustration.alt: Isla discovering a treasure map in her bedroom

pages.text: The first clue on the map showed a picture of something soft and fluffy. Isla looked around her room. 'My teddy bear!' she whispered excitedly. She hugged her brown teddy tight and found a shiny gold star sticker stuck to his ear.

illustration.description: A treasure map style illustration showing a girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes hugging a brown teddy bear. The scene is drawn like an adventure cartography map with hand-drawn elements, aged parchment background, and a golden star accent.
illustration.alt: Isla finding a gold star on her teddy bear

pages.text: The map's dotted trail led to the next clue - a picture of something that holds stories. Isla tiptoed to her bookshelf and found another gold star hidden between her favorite picture books. Two stars down, one more to go!

illustration.description: An adventure cartography style drawing of a girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes reaching toward a bookshelf. The illustration has sepia tones, compass rose details, and shows books drawn in treasure map style with a golden star jewel accent.
illustration.alt: Isla searching her bookshelf for treasure

pages.text: The final clue showed a crescent moon and stars. Isla looked up at her bedroom window where the real moon was shining softly. There on her windowsill was the third gold star, sparkling in the moonlight.

illustration.description: A treasure map style illustration of a girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes looking out her bedroom window at the moon. The scene is drawn like aged parchment with hand-drawn map elements, dotted trails leading to the window, and jewel accents around the moon and star.
illustration.alt: Isla finding the final star by her window

pages.text: With all three stars collected, something magical happened! The map began to glow softly, and new words appeared: 'The greatest treasure is a good night's sleep.' Isla smiled and placed the three stars on her nightstand.

illustration.description: An adventure cartography illustration showing a girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes holding a glowing treasure map. The aged parchment map shows bold explorers style lettering, compass roses, and three golden jewel accent stars arranged on a nightstand.
illustration.alt: Isla's treasure map revealing the final message

pages.text: Isla climbed into her cozy bed, hugging her teddy bear close. As she drifted off to sleep, she dreamed of new adventures waiting for tomorrow. The treasure map tucked safely under her pillow, ready for another day of exploring.

illustration.description: A peaceful treasure map style illustration of a girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes sleeping peacefully in bed with her teddy bear. The scene is drawn like hand-drawn adventure cartography with soft sepia tones, dotted trails of dreams floating above her head, and gentle jewel accents.
illustration.alt: Isla sleeping peacefully after her treasure hunt

metadata.illustrationStyle: treasure map style, aged parchment, compass roses, dotted trails, sepia tones, jewel accents, bold explorers, adventure cartography, hand-drawn maps

questions.question: Where did Isla find the treasure map?
questions.explanation: Isla found the treasure map under her pillow when she was getting ready for bed.

questions.question: What was the first treasure clue about?
questions.explanation: The first clue showed something soft and fluffy, which led Isla to her teddy bear.

questions.question: How many gold stars did Isla need to find?
questions.explanation: Isla found three gold stars - one on her teddy bear, one by her books, and one by her window.

questions.question: What was the greatest treasure according to the map?
questions.explanation: The map revealed that 'The greatest treasure is a good night's sleep.'
